hero.title: Discover the Precision of
hero.description: High-precision letter counting, word analysis, and Abjad calculations verified against scholarly standards. Built for researchers, scholars, and developers.

playground.title: Quranic Text Analysis
playground.description: Analyze Quranic verses or custom Arabic text with precision letter counting, word analysis, and Abjad calculations.
playground.enterHint: Enter any Arabic text to analyze. Diacritics are handled automatically.
playground.tipBasmalah: Try analyzing بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ — it has 19 letters and Abjad value of 786.
playground.tipAllah: The word الله has an Abjad value of 66 in the Mashriqi system.
playground.tipMuhammad: The name محمد has an Abjad value of 92.

search.title: Search Islamic Texts
search.description: Find relevant passages by meaning — not just keywords. Search across Quran verses, Tafsir, and Hadith collections using AI-powered semantic similarity.
search.placeholder: Search by meaning… e.g. 'mercy and forgiveness'
search.searchUnavailable: Search unavailable. Make sure the backend is running and embeddings are indexed.
search.noResultsHint: No passages matched your query at {percent}% similarity.
search.noResultsAdvice: Try lowering the minimum similarity or add more text sources in the
search.searchHint: You can search in Arabic, Turkish, or English. The AI understands meaning — not just exact words.

features.title: Powerful
features.description: Everything you need for precise Quranic text analysis, built with scholarly accuracy and modern technology.
features.letterCountingDesc: Multiple counting methods (Traditional, Uthmani Full, No Wasla) verified against Tanzil.net. Al-Fatiha = 139 letters.
features.abjadCalculatorDesc: Mashriqi and Maghribi numeral systems. All 28 letter values verified against scholarly standards. Basmalah = 786.
features.wordAnalysisDesc: Whitespace-delimited word counting following Tanzil standard. Full verse navigation with 6,236 verses across 114 surahs.
features.verifiedAccuracyDesc: Cross-referenced with Tanzil.net, Quran.com, IslamWeb, and classical scholarship. SHA-256 text integrity verification.
features.highPerformanceDesc: FastAPI backend with Redis caching. Sub-millisecond response times for analysis operations. Async PostgreSQL.
features.multiScriptDesc: Uthmani, Simple, and Uthmani Minimal script variants. Full Arabic text normalization and diacritics handling.
features.restApiDesc: Clean, well-documented REST API. OpenAPI specification with interactive documentation. Easy integration.
features.scholarlyStandardsDesc: Following Modern Computational standards (Tanzil/Quran.com). Comprehensive documentation of methodologies.
features.bottomNote: All features are open source and free to use

stats.title: By The
stats.description: Comprehensive coverage of the Holy Quran with verified accuracy.

demo.title: See It In
demo.description: Try the analysis engine with the Basmalah - the most analyzed phrase in Islamic tradition.
demo.funFact: The number 19 is significant in Quranic numerology, and 786 is universally recognized as the Abjad value of Basmalah.

cta.quoteTranslation: "And recite the Quran with measured recitation." - Al-Muzzammil 73:4
cta.title: Ready to
cta.description: Start analyzing Quranic text with precision and scholarly accuracy. Free and open source for the entire Ummah.
